text: LangChain is a popular open-source framework for building LLM-powered applications, providing chains, agents, memory, and tool integrations. It enables rapid prototyping of RAG and agent systems.
AutoGen (Microsoft Research, Wu et al. 2023) enables multi-agent conversations where LLM agents can chat with each other, humans, and tools to solve complex tasks collaboratively.
CrewAI and LangGraph represent the multi-agent orchestration paradigm where specialized AI agents collaborate in role-based teams, each with defined goals, tools, and memory for complex workflows.
